items.title: Gold Extends Gain as Weak US Jobs Data Lowers Rate-Hike Odds
items.description: Gold extended two days of gains after weak US jobs data reduced the chances of the Federal Reserve raising interest rates this year to tackle inflation.

items.title: Japan’s Convertible Bonds Regain Favor as Rates Continue to Rise
items.description: Japanese companies have sold the highest amount of convertible bonds in more than two decades in the first half, turning to the cheaper financing alternative as interest rates continue to climb.

items.title: Oil Edges Lower as More Supply Flows Through Strait of Hormuz
items.description: Oil slipped as flows through the Strait of Hormuz increased further, adding to a gush of near-term supply while talks between the US and Iran continue.
